pattern: Separate digits and letters into two buckets; interleave them starting with the larger bucket, which is only possible when their sizes differ by at most 1.
hints: Split the string into a list of digits and a list of letters.
A valid interleaving exists only when the two lists differ in size by at most 1.
Start with the larger group and alternate characters; if sizes are equal, either order works.

edge_inputs.description: two more digits than letters — impossible
